business.name: Rockerzz Gymnastics Academy
business.subtext: Professional gymnastics training for all ages and skill levels — from tiny tots to competitive athletes. We build strength, discipline, and confidence.
business.address: Apollo Pharmacy Line, Deepthi Sreenagar Colony, Madinaguda, 2, RTC Colony Rd, Deepthisri Nagar, Miyapur, Hyderabad, Telangana — 500 049

hero.subtext: Professional gymnastics training for all ages and skill levels — from tiny tots to competitive athletes. We build strength, discipline, and confidence.

about.description: Rockerzz Gymnastics Academy has grown into one of Hyderabad's most respected gymnastics training centres. We believe every child deserves world-class coaching — regardless of where they start. We train the whole athlete — body, mind and character. Every child who joins Rockerzz leaves stronger, more confident and more disciplined, whether or not they ever compete. Our facility has a full floor exercise area, balance beams, uneven bars, vault runway, and a foam pit for safe skill development.

products.name: Tiny Tots — Ages 3–5
products.description: A playful introduction to gymnastics for the youngest learners. Every session builds confidence, improves coordination and makes movement joyful through games and structured play. Tue & Thu · 10:00–11:00 AM · Coach: Priya Sharma

products.name: Beginners — Ages 6–9
products.description: A structured foundation batch for children new to gymnastics. Students learn correct technique, safe falling, and build strength through progressive drills. Covers cartwheels, forward rolls, handstands and basic bar work. Mon / Wed / Fri · 5:30–6:30 PM · Coach: Rahul Mehta

products.name: Intermediate — Ages 9–13
products.description: For students who have mastered the basics and are ready to progress to more dynamic skills. Covers back walkovers, round-offs, aerials, floor routines, beam and bars. Mon / Wed / Fri · 4:00–5:30 PM · Coach: Ananya Verma

products.name: Advanced & Competitive — Ages 12–17
products.description: Intensive training for students targeting district, state and national-level competitions. Focus on perfecting full routines, peak physical conditioning and competition mindset. Mon–Fri · 6:30–8:00 AM · Coach: Kiran Joshi

products.name: Artistic Gymnastics — Ages 10–18
products.description: A specialised programme covering all four women's artistic events — vault, uneven bars, balance beam and floor. Ideal for students with ambitions to compete at state and national level. Tue / Thu / Sat · 5:00–7:00 PM · Coach: Deepa Nair

products.name: Adult Fitness Gymnastics — Ages 18+
products.description: Designed for adults who want to improve flexibility, build core strength and experience the joy of gymnastics without any prior background. All fitness levels welcome. Sat & Sun · 8:00–9:30 AM · Coach: Priya Sharma

testimonials.name: Sunita Pawar
testimonials.text: My daughter trained here for two years and the transformation is incredible. She went from shy and uncoordinated to performing at state level. The coaches are truly exceptional.

testimonials.name: Amit Kulkarni
testimonials.text: The Tiny Tots programme was the best decision for our 4-year-old. Priya Ma'am has such a patient way with little ones. Vedant looks forward to every single class.

testimonials.name: Neha Joshi
testimonials.text: I joined the adult fitness batch with zero gymnastics background. Six months in and my flexibility and core strength are the best they've ever been. Highly recommend!

contact.address: Apollo Pharmacy Line, Deepthi Sreenagar Colony, Madinaguda, 2, RTC Colony Rd, Deepthisri Nagar, Miyapur, Hyderabad, Telangana — 500 049
